name: Sorcerer's Circle
flavor: Realms at War — a ring of standing stones humming with old magic. Reskin of the Transmogrifier.
summary: Activate at the end of a Move in contact (no enemy also touching): swap the positions of any two Warriors in play (with their tokens), no matter whose they are. Mark their spots with Move tokens before swapping.

effects.text: Swap any two Warriors' positions, carrying their tokens.
